title: What Problems Joz Can Solve
summary: Core enterprise problems Joz can address through Agentic AI, decision intelligence, context engineering, governance, and transformation.
claims: Joz solves enterprise problems where technology, data, people, workflows, and decision-making are disconnected.
His strongest problem areas include fragmented knowledge, slow decisions, weak AI adoption, unclear ROI, governance gaps, and operational friction.
He can work from problem framing through architecture, prototype, implementation guidance, and evaluation.
proof_points: Enterprise transformation across banking, insurance, national media, government, and technology.
Agentic AI, RAG, context engineering, AI governance, and multimodal systems.
Quantified outcomes in sales, audience growth, customer scale, and delivery efficiency.
